description: Accepted VPMR strict-100 rows and their final audited artifacts.
reconstruct_command: cat archives/vpmr_strict_100_final_results/vpmr_strict_100_final_results.tar.zst.part-* > vpmr_strict_100_final_results.tar.zst && sha256sum vpmr_strict_100_final_results.tar.zst && tar --use-compress-program zstd -xf vpmr_strict_100_final_results.tar.zst
